title: madia sativa var. racemosa
intro: Madia sativa var. racemosa, also known as Tanacetum racemosum, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States and Canada. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Madia sativa var. racemosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
